text: The glass-walled room evokes curiosity and a sense of separation; I observe others interacting within, their voices muffled but purposeful. Here on the outside, I feel like an outsider—invited to witness, but not to partake. Moving to the second scene, the bold, creative wall and technological displays stimulate my mind: I am surrounded by ideas in motion, a space dedicated to reflection and innovation. I feel excited, drawn to the intersection of human thought and engineered possibility, marveling at how environments shape my contemplative mood.
